info.title: KIBI Events API
info.description: API documentation for Events Service - Handles event management, registrations, and forms

success.description: Indicates if the operation was successful

requestId.description: Unique identifier for the request (for tracking)

description.example: Annual football tournament for under-19 players

organizerId.description: ID of the organizing sports organization

location.description: Physical location where the event will be held

ageGroup.description: Target age group for the event

formId.description: ID of the registration form associated with this event

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the event was created

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the event was last updated

description.example: Registration form for the U-19 Football Tournament 2025

createdBy.description: ID of the user who created the form

organizationId.description: ID of the organization that owns this form

formFields.description: List of fields in the form

options.description: Options for SELECT, MULTI_SELECT, and RADIO fields

submittedBy.description: ID of the user who submitted the form

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the form was created

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the form was last updated

get.description: Retrieves a list of all public events with optional filtering.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Filter events by name (case-insensitive, partial match)

parameters.name: organizationId
parameters.description: Filter events by organization ID

parameters.name: participationFee
parameters.description: Filter events by participation fee

parameters.name: organizerPhoneNumber
parameters.description: Filter events by organizer's phone number (Indian mobile format)

parameters.name: venue
parameters.description: Filter events by venue (case-insensitive, partial match)

parameters.name: organizationName
parameters.description: Filter events by organization name (case-insensitive, partial match)

parameters.name: address
parameters.description: Filter events by address (case-insensitive, partial match)

parameters.name: isApprovedByAdmin
parameters.description: Filter events by approval status

parameters.name: eventType
parameters.description: Filter events by type

parameters.name: deleted
parameters.description: Include deleted events (defaults to false)

data.description: Empty array when no events are found

sampleRequest.description: Sample request to get football tournaments

post.description: Creates a new event. Only accessible by organization users.

description.description: Detailed description of the event (max 1500 characters)

organizerEmail.description: Contact email for the event organizer

organizerPhoneNumber.description: Valid Indian mobile number with or without +91 prefix

mapLink.description: Google Maps or similar link to the venue

startDate.description: Event start date (must be in the future)

endDate.description: Event end date (must be in the future and >= startDate)

startTime.description: Event start time in HH:mm:ss format

formId.description: ID of the registration form to be used for this event

400.description: Bad Request - Validation or input errors

value.message: name is required
Event already exists with this name in this organization
Form does not exist with this id in this organization
Organization ID is required
Organizer phone number must be a valid Indian mobile number
Start date must be in the future
End date must be greater than or equal to start date

401.description: Unauthorized - Missing or invalid authentication token

message.example: Unauthorized access. Please provide valid authentication token
Access denied. Only organization users can create events

404.description: Not Found - Organization or Form not found

value.message: Organization does not exist with this id
Form does not exist with this id in this organization

message.example: Internal server error while creating event

delete.description: Deletes an event created by the organization. Only the organization that created the event can delete it.

parameters.name: eventId
parameters.description: ID of the event to delete

message.example: Event and related mappings deleted successfully.

400.description: Bad Request - Missing or invalid parameters

value.message: Organization ID is required.
Event ID is required.
Invalid event ID provided.

401.description: Unauthorized - Missing or invalid authentication token

message.example: Unauthorized access. Please provide valid authentication token.

403.description: Forbidden - Not authorized to delete this event

message.example: Access denied. You can only delete events from your own organization.

404.description: Event not found or already deleted

message.example: Event does not exist with this ID or is already deleted.
Internal server error while deleting event.

put.description: Updates an existing event. Only accessible by the creating organization.

parameters.name: eventId
parameters.description: ID of the event to update

newFormId.description: Optional - ID of the new form to associate with this event

400.description: Bad Request - Validation or input errors

value.message: Event ID is required.
Organization ID is required.
startDate must be a valid date
Provide data to be updated.

401.description: Unauthorized - Missing or invalid authentication token

403.description: Forbidden - Not authorized to update this event

message.example: Event not found with this event id.

value.message: Internal server error while updating event.
Event updated but unable to update the new form with this event. Try again later.

delete.description: Deletes an event and all its associated data (registrations, form responses, payments). This action is irreversible and can only be performed by admin users.

parameters.name: eventId
parameters.description: ID of the event to permanently delete

message.example: Event and all associated data deleted successfully.

value.message: Event ID is required.
Invalid event ID provided.

401.description: Unauthorized - Missing or invalid authentication token

403.description: Forbidden - Not authorized to delete events

message.example: Event not found with this ID.

value.message: Internal server error while deleting event.
Error deleting associated event data. Some data may remain.

get.description: Get list of affiliates registered for a specific event, including their registration and payment details.

parameters.name: eventId
parameters.description: ID of the event to get registrations for

401.description: Unauthorized - Missing or invalid authentication token

403.description: Forbidden - Not authorized to view registrations

get.description: Get all events created by the authenticated organization, including draft, published and closed events.

400.description: Bad Request - Missing or invalid parameters

401.description: Unauthorized - Missing or invalid authentication token

403.description: Forbidden - Not authorized to view organization events

message.example: No events found for this organization

post.description: Registers an authenticated affiliate for a specific event. Requires valid payment information and form submission.

affiliate_id.description: ID of the affiliate registering for the event

event_id.description: ID of the event to register for

form_id.description: ID of the registration form being submitted

payment_time.description: Payment timestamp in DD-MM-YYYY, HH:mm:ss format

400.description: Bad Request - Validation or input errors

value.message: affiliate_id is required
Invalid payment_time format. Expected format dd-MM-yyyy, HH:mm:ss
Affiliate is already registered for this event.
Event is not approved for registration yet.

401.description: Unauthorized - Missing or invalid authentication token

message.example: Affiliate account not found or not verified

value.message: Affiliate not found with this id.
Event not found with this id.
Form not found or not associated with this event.

get.description: Approves an event for public visibility. Only accessible by admin users.

parameters.name: eventId
parameters.description: ID of the event to approve

401.description: Unauthorized - Missing or invalid authentication token

403.description: Forbidden - Not authorized to approve events

get.description: Get list of all affiliates registered for an event. Admin access only.

parameters.name: eventId
parameters.description: ID of the event to get registrations for

401.description: Unauthorized - Missing or invalid authentication token

403.description: Forbidden - Not authorized to view registrations

get.description: Retrieves a list of all public forms with optional filtering by type and organization.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter forms by type

parameters.name: organizationId
parameters.description: Filter forms by organization ID

post.description: Creates a new form for event registrations. Only accessible by organization users.

order.description: Order of the field in the form

options.description: Options for select, checkbox, or radio fields

validation.description: Custom validation rules for the field

minPlayers.description: Minimum number of players (required for Team Sports)

maxPlayers.description: Maximum number of players (required for Team Sports)

400.description: Bad Request - Validation or input errors

value.message: formName is required
form_values.fields is required
type must be either Team Sports or Individual Play
Team Sports forms must have both minPlayers and maxPlayers defined

401.description: Unauthorized - Missing or invalid authentication token

get.description: Retrieves a specific form by its ID with all fields and configuration.

parameters.name: formId
parameters.description: ID of the form to retrieve

message.example: Form not found with this ID

put.description: Update form details with selective field updates. All fields are optional but must meet validation requirements when provided.

parameters.name: formId
parameters.description: ID of the form to update

order.description: Order of the field in the form

options.description: Options for select, checkbox, or radio fields

validation.description: Custom validation rules for the field

minPlayers.description: Minimum number of players (required for Team Sports)

maxPlayers.description: Maximum number of players (required for Team Sports)

401.description: Unauthorized - Missing or invalid authentication token

message.example: Not authorized to update this form

delete.description: Deletes an existing form and all its associated data. Only accessible by the organization that created the form.

parameters.name: formId
parameters.description: ID of the form to delete

401.description: Unauthorized - Missing or invalid authentication token

message.example: Not authorized to delete this form
Form not found with this ID

get.description: Retrieves all forms created by a specific organization, including draft and published forms.

parameters.name: organizationId
parameters.description: ID of the organization to get forms for

events_count.description: Number of events using this form

401.description: Unauthorized - Missing or invalid authentication token

403.description: Forbidden - Not authorized to view organization forms

message.example: Not authorized to view forms for this organization
No forms found for this organization

post.summary: Validate PAN using Digio KYC API
post.description: This endpoint validates a PAN number using Digio API.

500.description: Internal error or Digio API failure

post.summary: Validate GST using Digio KYC API
post.description: This endpoint validates a GST number using Digio API.

500.description: Internal error or Digio API failure
